title: Deck plan
description: The engine's input: an ordered list of slides, each naming a pattern from references/patterns/catalog.md plus that pattern's content slots. deck-strategy produces this; bin/generate.js consumes it. Accepts either a bare slides array or an object with deck-level meta.

speaker.description: One dialogue speaker = neutral static avatar bust (誰が言うか) + seam-free bubble whose tail points at ITS avatar + native quote (意味は言葉と記号が運ぶ — ポーズでは運ばない).

role.description: 話者ラベル（上司/部下/◯◯さま等）— shown under the avatar.

side.description: Avatar side; default alternates per row.

avatar.description: Supplied bust path (SVG master or transparent PNG). Absent -> in-engine neutral circle-mask bust.

hair.description: In-engine bust hair contour — speaker distinction only, never meaning.

crop.description: 顔アップ切出し window [fx,fy,fw,fh] as fractions of the supplied SVG viewBox — deterministic circle-mask head crop (加工可の範囲).

tailSide.description: Explicit bubble-tail override — normally derived from side; a mismatch fires the BUBBLE-TAIL lint.

personStyle.description: 1デッキ1様式 (deck-wide person style, decided by REGISTER): silhouette = 黒シルエット (抑制・graphic — formal/factual/numbers-first), illustration = カラーイラスト (親しみ・共感 — seminar/marketing). ALL persons in the deck (persona figures AND dialogue/testimonial avatars) follow this ONE style; STYLE-UNIFORM lint ERRORs on a mismatch. Unset = legacy behaviour (but a deck mixing BOTH styles still ERRORs — mixture is banned regardless).

intent.description: Register gate (references/principles/education-register.md): financial/board = 抑制＝信頼 (persona/speech bubbles are a register-gate ERROR); seminar/education = 学習・定着 (persona allowed under the 捏造ガード, imaginability transform ON). Shared floors (honesty / CUD / number atoms / no AI images) never flip.

footerLabel.description: Bottom-left brand label on body slides. Overrides theme.brand.footerLabel. Empty string = no label.

showPageNumbers.description: Show the page number at bottom-right of body slides.

persona.description: Education-register human device (education-register.md §3): a figure + seamless speech bubble + NATIVE quote + ※例 marking. Asset-independent slot. PRODUCTION figures = user-supplied licensed/open-license pro vectors (`figure`, kept under assets/generated/figures/ with LICENSE.md); the in-engine figure is an abstract pictogram and draws ONLY with the explicit opt-in `style:"pictogram"` (composition/coordinates identical either way). Neither set -> bubble+quote render without a person (lint WARNs the policy). financial/board intent = register-gate ERROR. The quote is 例示 — never attribute it to a real named person; `mark` (persona-mark lint WARNs when missing) states the fiction: ※学習用の架空の例.

quote.description: Speech-bubble line (native text; goes through the bake floor — kinsoku + number atoms). Keep it short (<=4 lines at the bubble width).

pose.description: concern = worried hook (ハの字 brows, flat mouth, no gesture); present = solution/summary (smile, one hand raised).

variant.description: Individual variation of the in-engine SVG figure.

tailSide.description: Bubble tail side (points at the figure). Default: bottom when the figure is right (message), left when the figure is left (two-column).

w.description: Figure box override (inches); defaults per host pattern.

h.description: Figure box height override (inches). make-markers fills this from a supplied asset's own pixel aspect so figures are never stretched.

mark.description: ※例 marking, e.g. ※学習用の架空の例 — REQUIRED in practice for fictional personas/figures (lint WARNs when absent).

recolor.description: Opt-in brand-token recolor for a supplied SVG figure: the source's signature-blue family is mapped onto the theme accent scale (line/grey/white and semantic warm colours keep their supplied values). Default false = supplied colours untouched.

figure.description: USER-LICENSED PNG path (drop-in mode). The engine never scrapes or AI-generates; rights are the user's responsibility.

style.description: Explicit opt-in for an in-engine figure. "silhouette" = full-body business silhouette (顔なし・実比率 ~7.4頭身, ink-token solid — the pro-deck idiom); "pictogram" = the flat abstract bust (トイレ標識水準 — deliberately not a realistic person; the hand-drawn trial confirmed pro human quality needs supplied assets). Without this and without `figure`, no person is drawn.

symbol.description: Scene-symbol overlay near the figure's head (悩み雲/電球/汗/？/↑/↓) — a separate code-drawn layer that composes over ANY figure source.

marker.description: Optional emphasis MARKER (one per slide, rides the protagonist element; design-lint enforces). badge = the DEFAULT device (native pill + native FACT label); underline = stronger intentional geometry (solid bar under the number); arrow-note = arrow + a note that must ADD information (duplicating card text is a lint ERROR); circle = hand-drawn wobble, gated behind theme layout.marker.handDrawn (off-register for business/financial — no shipped theme opts in). Text must be a data-supported FACT (過去最高/初/3期連続) — hype adjectives are lint-blocked (誠実ガード).

text.description: badge (<=8 chars) / arrow-note (<=14 chars) label. Facts only.

image.description: circle only: path to the rasterized transparent PNG (2x). build.sh's make-markers step fills this.

pattern.description: Pattern id. Must exist in the engine registry.

peak.description: The deck's ONE climax slide (peak-end design): opens the visual-contrast ceiling one step (message: surfaceAccent ground + stat one size step up; emphasis-capable patterns: the emphasis size step widens). Max 1 per deck, body patterns only (never cover/cta) — design-lint enforces both. See references/principles/visual-psychology.md.

content.description: Pattern-specific slots (see catalog.md). All patterns accept an optional 'notes' (speaker notes). Validated per-pattern below.

size.description: 声量: s=quiet lead-in, m=statement, l=payload (山場はサイズで語る — max ONE l line)

messageLines.description: Statement lines. Plain strings keep the legacy uniform rendering; objects add per-line tone/size (the 3-voice hierarchy: 前置き→決め台詞→補足).

statCaption.description: Sub-caption under the big stat. A string auto-wraps; an array of strings is rendered as author-controlled lines (manual kinsoku control until the line-break engine lands).

dark.description: Dark statement (感情を刻むページは紺): navy ground, onDark/one-accent text. Use ONLY on emotional turning points (dark budget <=~30% incl cover/sections/cta; never two adjacent in the body without intent).

statTone.description: 型D meaning-colour of the big number: accent=成果・答え・可能性 / warn=損害・痛み・覚悟 (never 'brand colour because important'; warn is honesty-gated).

diamond.description: Dark closings only: small accent diamond (the motif as a quiet full stop) between statement and statCaption.

emphasis.description: Protagonist row (0-based): its number circle + head step up to accentDeep. One per slide.
Which side carries the accent tint (0=left, 1=right). Default 1 — the house rule stays 'advocated side on the RIGHT'; use 0 only when the narrative genuinely leads left.

closing.description: 結びの1行帯 (closing band, <=2 lines, centered bold at a fixed height): line 1 = the page's 種明かし (head size), line 2 = a smaller aside. tone: base=ink, accent=answer, warn=痛み(honesty-gated), muted.

steps.description: 3-6 step labels (native text); the engine draws the arrow-connected nodes.

emphasis.description: Protagonist step (0-based): accent-filled node, onDark label, one size step up. One per slide.

marker.description: badge / arrow-note on the protagonist node (requires emphasis; no circle).

steps.description: 3-6 node labels (native text) placed on a ring; the engine draws the cyclic arrows.

emphasis.description: Protagonist node (0-based): accent-filled node, onDark label, one size step up. One per slide.

marker.description: badge / arrow-note on the protagonist node (requires emphasis; no circle).

axisX.description: X-axis end labels [left, right], shown top.

axisY.description: Y-axis end labels [top, bottom], shown left.

emphasizeIndex.description: LEGACY alias of emphasis (identical treatment). Do not set both.

emphasis.description: Protagonist quadrant (0=TL,1=TR,2=BL,3=BR): surfaceAccent tint + accentDeep head. One per slide.

quadrants.description: Exactly 4 quadrants (TL, TR, BL, BR), each {head?, body?}.

label.description: Category label under the bar (short; the band is height-gated).

value.description: total:true -> the absolute LEVEL; otherwise the signed delta (negatives render as ▲).

total.description: Anchor bar drawn from zero (start / subtotal / end).

items.description: 3-8 bridge items: levels (total:true) and signed drivers between them.

label.description: The WHOLE (資産 / 収入). Short TERM, not a sentence.

value.description: Optional. Omitted + all parts numeric -> the engine shows the honest sum.
All-or-none across parts: with values, stack heights are proportional (honest); without, equal split — the engine never invents proportions.

parts.description: 2-4 components stacked to the whole's height. Negative components (債務超過) are out of scope — use waterfall.

emphasis.description: Protagonist part (usually the 残り — 純資産 / 自由なお金): surfaceAccent tint + accentDeep head.

head.description: Short term (one line — a wrapping head is a hard overflow).

label.description: Optional in-card eyebrow (STEP 1 / a numeral): accent-deep, small caps; latin labels get charSpacing 3. The ordering symbol without a number circle.

cards.description: 3-6 head+body cards: 3 = one tall 1x3 row (STEP/約束 form), 4-6 = two rows.

emphasizeIndex.description: LEGACY alias of emphasis (identical treatment). Do not set both.

emphasis.description: Protagonist card (row-major): surfaceAccent tint + accentDeep head. One per slide.

closing.description: 結びの1行帯 (closing band, <=2 lines, centered bold at a fixed height): line 1 = the page's 種明かし (head size), line 2 = a smaller aside. tone: base=ink, accent=answer, warn=痛み(honesty-gated), muted.

result.description: Optional result box (tinted), drawn first with an = between it and the operands.

operands.description: 2-4 factor/summand labels joined by the operator glyph.

closing.description: 結びの1行帯 (closing band, <=2 lines, centered bold at a fixed height): line 1 = the page's 種明かし (head size), line 2 = a smaller aside. tone: base=ink, accent=answer, warn=痛み(honesty-gated), muted.

source.description: The single anchor node (tinted): the source in diverge, the result in converge.

branches.description: 2-4 branch labels; the engine stacks them and fans the arrows.

direction.description: diverge (default): 1 source -> N branches. converge: N branches -> 1 result.

closing.description: 結びの1行帯 (closing band, <=2 lines, centered bold at a fixed height): line 1 = the page's 種明かし (head size), line 2 = a smaller aside. tone: base=ink, accent=answer, warn=痛み(honesty-gated), muted.

steps.description: 3-5 ascending stage labels (native text); the engine draws the staircase blocks, tinting the last (goal) block.

date.description: Short date/year (e.g. 2014.10) — one line; the height gate rejects a wrapping date.

label.description: What happened — short; baked (kinsoku) and height-gated per milestone.

milestones.description: 3-7 dated milestones drawn on the horizontal spine, alternating above/below.

oneOf.description: band (帯グラフ) only: 2-4 segments; first segment's labels are the 1-5 category rows.

chartType.description: column (default) = categories/few periods; bar = ranking with long labels; line = continuous trend; pie/doughnut = parts of ONE whole, max 5 slices; band = 100% stacked composition (series becomes an ARRAY of 2-4 segments).

unit.description: Shown once top-left (単位：…), never on every bar.

emphasizeIndex.description: Colour ONE bar/slice accentDeep and mute the rest.

targetLine.description: Dashed reference line over the columns (前年 / 目標).

marker.description: badge / arrow-note on the takeaway card (no circle).

emphasizeIndex.description: LEGACY stat-grid emphasis: tint + accentDeep value (no size/width step). Prefer emphasis; do not set both.

emphasis.description: Protagonist KPI card (0-based) — AREA emphasis: card ~1.45x wide (others share the rest), the NUMBER jumps ×1.7 (×1.8 on peak) with the unit small beside it, accentDeep on tint. One per slide.

closing.description: 結びの1行帯 (closing band, <=2 lines, centered bold at a fixed height): line 1 = the page's 種明かし (head size), line 2 = a smaller aside. tone: base=ink, accent=answer, warn=痛み(honesty-gated), muted.

positions.description: 2-3 competitive positions side-by-side with VS between (structure word: positioning).

emphasis.description: Protagonist position (usually 自社): surfaceAccent tint + accentDeep head.

nodes.description: 2-5 ecosystem actors on one row (structure word: system).

label.description: What flows (モノ/カネ/情報) — labeled arrows are the point of this skeleton.

links.description: Adjacent forward links run between the nodes (label above); return/long-range links run in the lane below (label under).
[leftIndex, rightIndex] correspondence pairs — lines, not arrows (no fake causality).

after.description: The correction (tinted panel — the fixed protagonist). Must describe the SAME thing as before (no distortion).

speakers.description: Plain conversation: speakers alternate left/right down the page (side auto; override per speaker).

verdict.description: ○良い例 / ×悪い例 — the SYMBOL+LABEL carry the meaning (never colour alone, CUD floor).

columns.description: ○×比較 form: exactly two verdict columns (good/bad) of 1-2 speakers each.

mark.description: ※例 marking for the fictional conversation (one per slide) — PERSONA-MARK WARNs when absent.

name.description: 話者ラベル（「◯◯さま」等）— fictional unless the user supplies approved real voices (捏造ガード).

mark.description: ※例 marking — REQUIRED in practice for sample voices; real testimonials need user approval + source management.
